project.name: SACAD
project.description: Sistema de Administración de Carreras, Actividades y Docentes
project.full_description: Sistema de Administración de Carreras, Actividades y Docentes

architecture.summary: Monorepo con backend Django REST Framework + frontend React (Vite + Tailwind CSS v4) + PostgreSQL, orquestado con Docker Compose. Nginx como proxy inverso.

nginx_reverse_proxy.purpose: Frontend that proxies API/admin/accounts/static/media to backend
nginx_reverse_proxy.config: frontend/nginx.conf (standalone) OR nginx/nginx.conf + nginx/frontend.conf (dedicated reverse proxy with upstreams)

deployment_options.development: docker compose up -d (reads .env, uses development settings)
deployment_options.production: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d (production settings, SSL-ready)
deployment_options.local_frontend: make dev-frontend (npm run dev with proxy to localhost:8000)

base.py.CORS_ALLOW_ALL_ORIGINS: true when DEBUG, else from env

urls_root.api/auth/: usuarios app (JWT login, Google callback, etc.)
api/: academica app (facultades, sedes, carreras, planes, materias, correlatividades, dashboard)

PlanEstudio.custom_logic: save() auto-deactivates other vigente plans for same carrera; clean() validates only one vigente plan per carrera

serializers.FacultadSerializer: full fields, validates nombre_corto and nombre case-insensitive uniqueness (excludes self on update)
serializers.FacultadListSerializer: id, codigo, nombre_corto, nombre, activa + carreras_count (SerializerMethodField) + sedes_count (SerializerMethodField)
serializers.CarreraSerializer: all fields + facultad_nombre + sedes (PrimaryKeyRelatedField, many) + sedes_nombres (SerializerMethodField). codigo defaults to codigo_ministerial or 'sin-codigo'
serializers.CarreraListSerializer: id, codigo_ministerial, nombre_corto, nombre, facultad, facultad_nombre, sedes_nombres, activa

views.FacultadViewSet: ModelViewSet. List uses FacultadListSerializer. Create/update/destroy requires EsAdminUniversidad permission. destroy catches ProtectedError (409), perform_destroy checks sedes.exists() first, then carreras.exists()
views.SedeViewSet: ModelViewSet. select_related('facultad'). List uses SedeListSerializer. Create/update/destroy requires EsSecretarioAcademico. perform_destroy checks carreras.exists() and raises ProtectedError (caught in custom destroy returning 409)
views.CarreraViewSet: ModelViewSet. select_related('facultad'). List uses CarreraListSerializer. Create/update/destroy requires EsSecretarioAcademico. perform_destroy checks planes.exists() (ProtectedError → 409)
views.PlanEstudioViewSet: ModelViewSet. select_related('carrera'). Extra actions: arbol_curricular(detail), recientes(list, top 10). perform_create ensures only one vigente plan
views.MateriaViewSet: ModelViewSet. select_related('plan_estudio'). Detail uses MateriaDetailSerializer. Extra action: correlativas(detail). Create/update/destroy requires EsDirectorCarrera

filters.CarreraFilter: facultad, activa, nivel, modalidad (exact), codigo_ministerial, nombre_corto (icontains)

permissions.EsDirectorCarrera: is_superuser OR groups ['Admin Universidad', 'Secretario Académico', 'Director Carrera']
permissions.EsDeSuFacultad: object-level: superuser OR obj.facultad.decano == request.user OR obj.carrera.director == request.user

urls.router: facultades, sedes, carreras, planes, materias, correlatividades

serializers.UserSerializer: id, username, email, first_name, last_name, is_staff, groups, group_names (SerializerMethodField, string[]), is_superuser, foto (from profile), zoom_level (from profile)
serializers.EmailTokenObtainSerializer: validates email+password, checks is_active, returns user

views.google_login: POST /auth/google/ - placeholder, actual flow is via allauth
views.google_complete: GET /auth/google/complete/ - allauth callback handler, redirects to frontend with JWT tokens as URL params
views.pending_users: GET /auth/pending-users/ - staff only, lists is_active=False users
views.approve_user: PATCH /auth/approve-user/<id>/ - staff only, sets is_active=True. Auto-assigns group 'Director Carrera' if user has no groups

behaviors.domain_restriction: email must contain SACAD_DOMAIN_RESTRICTION (default @fce.uncu.edu.ar), otherwise ImmediateHttpResponse redirect to /accounts/login/ with error message
behaviors.new_users: if user has no pk (new), set username=email prefix, is_active=False, save, and ImmediateHttpResponse redirect to FRONTEND_URL/auth/pending
behaviors.existing_approved: existing active users can login normally (adapter does not intervene)

admin.UserAdmin (custom SACADUserAdmin): list_display=[email, username, first_name, last_name, is_active, is_staff], action: approve_users

Equivalencia.validation: clean() checks that all materias_origen and materias_destino belong to same carrera via plan_estudio.carrera

methods.resolver_directas: finds direct equivalencias matching materia_origen_id + plan_destino_id + activa=True
methods.resolver_en_cascada: recursively follows equivalencia chains: if A=B+C and B=D, then A=D+C. Uses BFS loop
methods.validar_sin_ciclos: static, checks no A->B and B->A cycle exists
methods.get_stats_plan: static, counts equivalencias as origen/destino for a plan

serializers.EquivalenciaSerializer: all fields + plan_destino_nombre + materias_origen_display + materias_destino_display (all SerializerMethodField). Validates at least one origen and destino on create/update

views.EquivalenciaViewSet: ModelViewSet. prefetch_related('materias_origen','materias_destino'). Filters by plan_destino and materia_origen query params. Extra actions: consultar (GET, resolves cascade), validar (POST, checks cycles)

tailwind_config.css_file: src/index.css (Tailwind v4 @import + @theme directive for custom colors/fonts/shadows)

route_structure.Provider_tree: ThemeProvider > AppWrapper(HelmetProvider) > AuthProvider > Router > ScrollToTop > Routes

public_routes./auth/callback: AuthCallback (receives JWT tokens from Google OAuth redirect, calls login())

auth_flow.standard_login: SignInForm → email+password → POST /auth/login/ → JWT tokens → login() stores in sessionStorage → navigate('/')
auth_flow.google_login: Click 'Ingresar con Google' → window.location = /accounts/google/login/?process=login → allauth handles OAuth → redirects to /api/auth/google/complete/ → google_complete view redirects to FRONTEND_URL/auth/callback?access=X&refresh=Y → AuthCallback reads params → login() → navigate('/')
auth_flow.new_google_user: FCEGoogleAccountAdapter creates user with is_active=False → ImmediateHttpResponse redirects to FRONTEND_URL/auth/pending → AuthPending shows modal 'Cuenta pendiente de aprobación'
auth_flow.pending_users_approval: Admin hits GET /auth/pending-users/ (staff only) → list of inactive users → PATCH /auth/approve-user/<id>/ (staff only) sets is_active=True, auto-assigns 'Director Carrera' group if user has no groups
auth_flow.logout: UserDropdown sign out button → AuthContext.logout() → removes tokens from sessionStorage → setUser(null) → window.location.replace('/signin')
auth_flow.auto_logout: On browser close, sessionStorage is cleared → no access_token on reload → user is unauthenticated → ProtectedRoute redirects to /signin

session_token_handling.client_interceptor: apiClient (axios) reads access_token from sessionStorage, sets Authorization Bearer header on all requests. On 401 response, attempts token refresh via /auth/token/refresh/. On refresh failure, clears tokens and redirects to /signin
session_token_handling.AuthContext_init: On mount, reads access_token from sessionStorage. If exists, calls /auth/me/ to populate user. Sets loading=false when done

FacultadesPage.delete_flow: If sedes_count>0 or carreras_count>0 → blocked modal with reason (no delete allowed). Otherwise → confirmation modal → DELETE /facultades/:id → refetch
FacultadesPage.form_validation: client-side required fields + server-side error mapping to individual fields (case-insensitive duplicate name/nombre_corto)
FacultadesPage.conditional_buttons: Agregar/Editar/Eliminar hidden unless is_superuser or group 'Admin Universidad'

SedesPage.delete_flow: Confirmation modal → DELETE /sedes/:id → catches 409 ProtectedError → shows error message with server detail
SedesPage.form_validation: client-side required fields for codigo, nombre, facultad
SedesPage.conditional_buttons: Agregar/Editar/Eliminar hidden unless is_superuser or group 'Admin Universidad' or 'Secretario Académico'

CarrerasPage.delete_flow: Confirmation modal → DELETE /carreras/:id → catches 409 ProtectedError → shows error
CarrerasPage.sedes_loading: openEdit calls loadSedes(facultadId); changing facultad in form calls loadSedes or clears options
CarrerasPage.useApiData_deps: [qs] (search param string) so refetch happens on filter change
CarrerasPage.conditional_buttons: Agregar/Editar/Eliminar hidden unless is_superuser or group 'Admin Universidad' or 'Secretario Académico'

PlanesPage.list_view: table with Carrera, Versión, Año, Horas, Materias count, Estado (Vigente badge). Click row → tab detail view via ?id=X search param
PlanesPage.detail_view: 3 tabs: Info (plan fields), Materias (table from /materias/?plan_estudio=X), Árbol Curricular (cards grouped by año/cuatrimestre from /planes/X/arbol-curricular/)

MateriasPage.list_view: table with Código, Nombre, Año, Cuatrimestre, Horas Semanales, Horas Totales, Tipo (badge)

EquivalenciasPage.layout: 2-column grid: left=consulta form, right=registered equivalencias list
EquivalenciasPage.consulta: inputs for materia_origen_id + plan_destino_id → GET /equivalencias/consultar/ → shows results list
EquivalenciasPage.registered_list: GET /equivalencias/ → shows cards with origen → destino, tipo, plan name

ProfilePage.functionality: photo upload via PATCH /auth/profile/ with FormData. Shows preview on file select. Hover overlay to change. Displays user initials avatar fallback (brand-500 bg), full name, email

auth_pages.SignIn: AuthPageLayout + SignInForm. Form has email/password + Google button. Google button goes to /accounts/google/login/?process=login
auth_pages.SignUp: AuthPageLayout + SignUpForm. Template only (not functional for registration; all signup is via Google OAuth)
auth_pages.AuthCallback: Reads access/refresh from URL search params → calls login() → navigate('/')
auth_pages.AuthPending: Shows non-dismissable modal 'Cuenta pendiente de aprobación' explaining admin must enable account. Link to /signin
auth_pages.AuthPageLayout: 2-column layout: left (flex-1) = children, right (lg:w-1/2, bg-brand-950) = UNCUYO blanco logo + system description. ThemeTogglerTwo in bottom-right corner

layout.AppLayout: SidebarProvider wraps LayoutContent. LayoutContent: sidebar div + main content (ml-[290px] or ml-[90px] depending on isExpanded/isHovered). Outlet in padded container
layout.AppSidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Width 290px expanded, 90px collapsed. On hover when collapsed → 290px (isHovered state). Logos: uncuyo_color.png / uncuyo_blanco.PNG (expanded), uncuyo_color_logo.PNG / uncuyo_blanco_logo.PNG (collapsed). Navigations: SACAD section (Dashboard, Académica submenu with Facultades/Sedes/Carreras/Planes/Materias, Equivalencias) + Módulos section. Submenu animation via scrollHeight. Active detection via location.pathname. Mobile: full-screen overlay with Backdrop
layout.AppHeader: Sticky top bar. Left: hamburger toggle (sidebar toggle on desktop, mobile sidebar on mobile). Center: search input with Cmd+K shortcut. Right: ZoomControl, ThemeToggleButton, NotificationDropdown, UserDropdown. Mobile: AppHeader shows logo, hamburger, and application menu toggle
layout.UserDropdown: Avatar circle with initials (generated from first/last name, fallback email first char, colored by hash). If user has foto, shows image. Dropdown: name+email, links (Mi Perfil, Account settings, Support), Sign out button. Sign out calls logout() which clears sessionStorage and redirects to /signin
layout.SidebarWidget: Bottom widget showing SACAD name and full description text

common_components.PageMeta: Uses react-helmet-async to set <title> and <meta description> per page
common_components.PageBreadcrumb: Dual mode: pageTitle (legacy with Home icon arrow breadcrumb) / items (Dotted Divider: Home · Label1 · Label2). items mode uses · separator, last item is gray-800 (current page), preceding items are links
common_components.Modal: Overlay modal with backdrop blur, escape key closes, scroll lock on body. Optional close button (default true). Custom className for sizing. Rounded-3xl, dark mode support
common_components.Button: Supports sm/md sizes, primary/outline variants, startIcon/endIcon, disabled state with opacity
common_components.InputField: Text/number/email/password/date/time inputs. Supports error/success/disabled states, hint text
common_components.Label: Form label with tailwind-merge + clsx for styling
common_components.Switch: Toggle switch with check/cross icons, disabled state
common_components.Checkbox: Custom checkbox with checkmark SVG overlay
common_components.DropdownItem: Link or button menu item with configurable classNames
common_components.GridShape: Decorative grid SVG images for auth layout
common_components.ThemeToggleButton: Header button to toggle dark/light mode
common_components.ZoomControl: Dropdown in AppHeader with zoom levels 75/90/100/110/125/150%. PATCH /auth/update-zoom/ on change. Applies via document.documentElement.style.fontSize. Restored from /auth/me/ on login
common_components.ThemeTogglerTwo: Floating circular button for auth pages theme toggle
common_components.ScrollToTop: Scrolls to top on route change

hooks.useApiData: Generic data fetching hook. Takes URL + deps array. Returns {data, loading, error, refetch}. Calls apiClient.get on mount and when deps change
hooks.useGoBack: Navigates back if history exists, otherwise to /
hooks.useModal: Simple boolean toggle hook. Returns {isOpen, openModal, closeModal, toggleModal}

api_client.response_interceptor: On 401, attempts token refresh via POST /auth/token/refresh/ with sessionStorage.refresh_token. On success, retries original request. On failure, clears sessionStorage and redirects to /signin

contexts.AuthContext: Manages user state (User includes group_names: string[], is_superuser: boolean, zoom_level: number), login/logout functions, loading. Applies zoom_level via document.documentElement.style.fontSize on mount and login. Tokens stored in sessionStorage. On mount checks for existing access_token and validates via /auth/me/
contexts.ThemeContext: light/dark theme. Persisted to localStorage. Adds/removes 'dark' class on document.documentElement
contexts.SidebarContext: isExpanded, isMobileOpen, isHovered, activeItem, openSubmenu. Collapses sidebar on mobile automatically. Hover expands collapsed sidebar

nginx.standalone_frontend_nginx: frontend/nginx.conf - listens port 80, serves static files, proxies /api/, /admin/, /accounts/, /static/, /media/ to http://backend:8000

docker_compose_files.docker-compose.yml: Development. 3 services: db, backend, frontend. Frontend on port 80. Backend on port 8000. Variables from .env with defaults
docker_compose_files.docker-compose.prod.yml: Production. No defaults required (all vars must be in .env). Restart: unless-stopped. Backups volume mounted. No debug toolbar

make_commands.makemigrations: docker compose exec backend python manage.py makemigrations
make_commands.migrate: docker compose exec backend python manage.py migrate
make_commands.shell: docker compose exec backend python manage.py shell_plus
make_commands.backup: pg_dump via docker compose exec db
make_commands.restore: pg_restore via docker compose exec db

key_decisions: Duplicados de facultad validados vía serializer (case-insensitive, exclude self on update), no DB unique constraint, to avoid issues with existing data
Profile model (OneToOneField) instead of extending User, avoiding custom user model migration complexity
Logos in /logos/ inside public/, served statically by nginx without backend involvement
codigo in CarreraSerializer with default='' so UniqueTogetherValidator doesn't fail on create without that field (falls back to codigo_ministerial or 'sin-codigo')
New Google users created with is_active=False; login interrupted via ImmediateHttpResponse in pre_social_login adapter
Sedes with unique_together=['facultad','codigo'] because codigo is meaningful within each facultad, not globally
Add button icon: SVG inline (white circle + brand-500 plus path) in startIcon prop, size w-5 h-5 (20px), button font-semibold
Tokens stored in sessionStorage (not localStorage) so session ends on browser close
Cascade delete protection: Facultad checks sedes then carreras; Sede checks carreras; Carrera checks planes. All return 409 with detail message
Frontend validates facultad delete upfront (checks sedes_count/carreras_count from list before showing confirm modal) for better UX
Zoom applied via fontSize on <html> (scales rem of Tailwind) instead of CSS transform/zoom for layout compatibility
group_names (string[]) exposed in UserSerializer instead of numeric group IDs so frontend can do semantic comparisons without ID-to-name mapping
Auto-assign Director Carrera on approve_user ensures newly approved Google users always have at least basic write access (materias)
Frontend buttons hidden (not disabled) for users without permission to avoid clutter and reduce confusion
